name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or feature for OpenKit.tools
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the tool or feature you'd like to see -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this solve? Why is it needed? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- How do you envision this working? -->

## Example Use Cases

<!-- Provide real-world scenarios where this would be useful -->

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or features? -->

## Client-Side Feasibility

<!-- Can this feature run entirely in the browser without server-side processing? -->

- [ ] Yes, this can be done completely client-side
- [ ] No, this requires server-side processing
- [ ] Unsure

**If server-side is required, explain why:**

## Similar Tools

<!-- Are there similar tools elsewhere? How would this be different/better? -->

## Design Mockup

<!-- If applicable, add mockups or wireframes -->

## Priority

<!-- How important is this to you? -->

- [ ] Critical - blocking my workflow
- [ ] High - would significantly improve my productivity
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor convenience

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other information, screenshots, or examples -->

## Implementation Willingness

<!-- Are you willing to help implement this? -->

- [ ] I can implement this myself and submit a PR
- [ ] I can help with implementation
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] I can provide feedback on implementation
- [ ] I can only report the feature request
